title: Frozen facts snapshot, version 1
description: state/frozen-facts/<entity-key>.yaml — an entity's source-derived facts, snapshotted before its raw payload blob is pruned so a later rebuild can carry it forward (marked carried+frozen) instead of leaving a data hole. NOT regenerable from raw once the blob is gone; lives in state/, never touched by a rebuild.

entity.description: the full derived entity current-state dict (e.g. posting.yaml)

files.description: large sibling artifacts by filename (jd.md, jd-<hash>.md)
